name: a design that grounds against nothing consults zero namespaces (every namespace needs_grounding)
command: printf '%s' '{"pillars":{},"needs_grounding":[]}' > d.json && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/full-surface-consult.sh" --design d.json --json 2>/dev/null > out.json; node -e 'const j=require("./out.json");process.exit(j.consulted.length===0 && j.needs_grounding.length===j.namespaces_total ?0:1)' && echo empty-consults-none 1>&2
